authors: Mike Cowburn Ulrike Klinger Anders Olof Larsson a European
raw_title: Campaigning in the Age of Platforms: A Longitudinal Analysis of German Parties & Politicians
title_en: Campaigning in the Age of Platforms: A Longitudinal Analysis of German Parties & Politicians
title_zh: 平台时代的竞选活动：德国政党与政治人物的纵向分析
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究分析了德国政党和政治人物如何随着时间推移，在数字平台上开展竞选活动。它探讨了社交媒体等平台如何改变了政治沟通和选举策略。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how German political parties and politicians conduct election campaigns on digital platforms over time. It explores how platforms like social media have transformed political communication and campaign strategies.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字媒体时代政治竞选活动的演变，特别关注平台如何重塑政党与选民之间的互动模式。
research_direction_en: Investigating the evolution of political campaigning in the digital media era, with particular focus on how platforms reshape interaction patterns between parties and voters.
